message:
test(harness): add 19 conflict/recovery composition tests (bd-mblr.2.1.2)

Conflict/recovery assertions on integrated backend: drop-mid-txn recovery,
savepoints (nested/partial/release), constraint violations (PK unique,
INSERT OR REPLACE, INSERT OR IGNORE), WAL recovery, sequential consistency,
concurrent mode, multi-connection, schema recovery, rapid cycles, error recovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
